Interface Team

public interface Team
Represents a team managed by the active TeamsService.

Implementations returned by a provider are read-only snapshots of a team at a specific point in time. To modify team data, use the mutation methods on TeamsService.

All methods that return collections return unmodifiable views. Structural mutations via the returned collections are not supported.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getDisplayName()
    Returns the display name of this team, as shown to players.
    UUID
    getId()
    Returns the unique identifier of this team.
    int
    getMaxSize()
    Returns the maximum allowed number of members in this team.
    Optional<TeamMember>
    getMember(UUID playerUUID)
    Returns the TeamMember record for the given player, if they are a member.
    Collection<TeamMember>
    getMembers()
    Returns all members of this team, including the owner.
    Collection<UUID>
    getMemberUUIDs()
    Returns the UUIDs of all players who are members of this team, including the owner.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the internal name of this team.
    UUID
    getOwnerUUID()
    Returns the UUID of the player who owns this team.
    int
    getSize()
    Returns the current number of members in this team.
    boolean
    isMember(UUID playerUUID)
    Returns true if the given player is a member of this team (any role).
    boolean
    isOwner(UUID playerUUID)
    Returns true if the given player is the owner of this team.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      UUID getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this team.

      Team IDs are assigned by the provider at creation time and remain stable for the lifetime of the team, even if the team's name changes.

      Returns:
      the team's UUID; never null

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the internal name of this team.

      Names are typically used as keys for configuration and storage. Name uniqueness and case-sensitivity depend on the provider.

      Returns:
      the team's internal name; never null

    • getDisplayName

      String getDisplayName()
      Returns the display name of this team, as shown to players.

      Display names may include color codes or MiniMessage formatting, depending on the provider. Implementations that do not differentiate between name and display name should return getName() here.

      Returns:
      the team's display name; never null

    • getOwnerUUID

      UUID getOwnerUUID()
      Returns the UUID of the player who owns this team.

      The owner always holds the TeamRole.OWNER role. Ownership transfer is handled through the provider's role-change mechanisms.

      Returns:
      the owner's UUID; never null

    • getMembers

      Collection<TeamMember> getMembers()
      Returns all members of this team, including the owner.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable collection of TeamMembers; never null

    • getMemberUUIDs

      Collection<UUID> getMemberUUIDs()
      Returns the UUIDs of all players who are members of this team, including the owner.

      This is a convenience method equivalent to mapping getMembers() by TeamMember.getPlayerUUID().

      Returns:
      an unmodifiable collection of UUIDs; never null

    • getSize

      int getSize()
      Returns the current number of members in this team.
      Returns:
      the member count (always >= 1)

    • getMaxSize

      int getMaxSize()
      Returns the maximum allowed number of members in this team.

      A value of -1 indicates that no upper limit is imposed by the provider for this team.

      Returns:
      the maximum size, or -1 for unlimited

    • getMember

      Optional<TeamMember> getMember(UUID playerUUID)
      Returns the TeamMember record for the given player, if they are a member.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player to look up
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the TeamMember, or empty if the player is not a member of this team

    • isMember

      boolean isMember(UUID playerUUID)
      Returns true if the given player is a member of this team (any role).
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player to check
      Returns:
      true if the player is a member, false otherwise

    • isOwner

      boolean isOwner(UUID playerUUID)
      Returns true if the given player is the owner of this team.
      Parameters:
      playerUUID - the UUID of the player to check
      Returns:
      true if the player holds the TeamRole.OWNER role
